summary: Handle Ctrl+C globally with exit code 130 and no traceback; treat invalid AI JSON payload type as transient and retryable.
source_links: user-report: Ctrl+C should stop all reports cleanly; webui invalid JSON NoneType during overload
details: Catch KeyboardInterrupt in CLI main and exit with SystemExit(130).
Retry AI calls on ValueError for invalid JSON response type (e.g., None response body under overload).
Avoid dumping heavy curl diagnostics for generic transient AI failures because it disrupts progress output.
